channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Gregg Popovich has medical incident in restaurant, is resting at home, AP source says
item.description: San Antonio coach Gregg Popovich is doing well at home after needing medical attention earlier this week following an incident at a restaurant, a person with knowledge of the matter told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Messi meets the Dawg Pound: Soccer superstar leads Inter Miami into Cleveland against Columbus
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lionel Messi has played in his share of unique environments as one of the top soccer players in the world. He adds another on Saturday when the Argentine superstar visits the Dawg Pound.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pistons are back in the playoffs and take NBA-record postseason losing streak into Game 1 vs Knicks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York beating Detroit had become something of an NBA certainty, with the Knicks doing it 16 straight times over a span of five years. The Pistons finally ended that streak with three wins over the Knicks during their massive 2024-25 turnaround season.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bay Area News Group girls athlete of the week: Allison Lui, Notre Dame-Belmont softball
item.description: Notre Dame-Belmont's Allison Lui pitched a complete game in a 3-1 win over Notre Dame-San Jose, allowing just an unearned run and hitting a single to key NDB’s three-run rally in the top half of the seventh inning. She walked just one NDSJ batter and struck out 13.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Maine Democrats trying to amend state constitution to codify allowing trans athletes in girls' sports
item.description: Maine Democrats took a step toward constitutionalizing trans athletes' protections the day after the DOJ announced a lawsuit against the state over the issue.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah Hockey Club excited about future
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club was hoping its first season in Salt Lake City would end with a playoff berth, but they still are extremely thankful for the fan support they received in their inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox lose 8-0 after calling up Top 100 prospect, reinstating Benintendi from IL
item.description: The Athletics defeated the White Sox 8-0 behind four home runs from four different players and two run-scoring doubles from shortstop Jacob Wilson, despite the White Sox calling up prized catching prospect Edgar Quero and reinstating outfielder Andrew Benintendi from the 10-day injured list.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Hendricks plans to come back stronger than ever
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This was supposed to be the season Taylor Hendricks took a big step forward. After showing promising signs his rookie year, in which he averaged 7.3 points in 40 games, Hendricks was excited to be a big part of the Jazz rebuild.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
